summary: Data Credibility & Supplier Intelligence Phase testing complete: Backend API 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend components verified working - SourceTrustBadge, FreshnessIndicator, SourceDot displayed correctly. System Health Dashboard accessible at /admin/health.
passed_tests: Backend: Enriched product has data_confidence field (live/estimated/fallback)
Backend: Enriched product has source_signals dict with 6 signals (supplier_cost, order_velocity, cj_supplier, tiktok_trend, ad_activity, meta_ads)
Backend: Enriched product has scoring_metadata.source_breakdown with per-signal confidence tracking
Backend: CJ fields present - cj_price, cj_shipping_days, cj_processing_days, cj_availability, cj_warehouse, cj_variants_count
Backend: AliExpress fields present - orders_30d, ae_shipping_days, ae_rating, ae_reviews
Backend: TikTok fields present - tiktok_views, engagement_rate, ad_count
Backend: Meta fields present - meta_active_ads, meta_ad_growth_7d, estimated_monthly_ad_spend
Backend: POST /api/data-integration/enrich/{product_id} requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/data-integration/enrich/{product_id} returns product_id, data_confidence, source_signals, sources_status
Backend: sources_status contains aliexpress, cj_dropshipping, tiktok, meta_ads
Backend: Enrich handles invalid product ID correctly
Backend: GET /api/data-integration/source-health requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/data-integration/source-health returns sources array with success_rate, total_pulls, last_success
Backend: GET /api/data-integration/ingestion-status requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/data-integration/ingestion-status returns enriched_count, total_products, confidence_breakdown
Backend: POST /api/data-integration/run-ingestion requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/data-integration/run-ingestion requires admin role and returns {status: started}
Backend: POST /api/ingestion/scores/recompute works with X-API-Key header
Frontend: Dashboard loads successfully with live data indicator
Frontend: SourceDot components displayed next to product names on dashboard (verified in code)
Frontend: Product detail page shows SourceTrustBadge (Estimated badge visible)
Frontend: Product detail page shows FreshnessIndicator (Just now timestamp visible)
Frontend: Score breakdown shows Sources and Confidence info at bottom
Frontend: System Health Dashboard accessible at /admin/health for admin user
Frontend: System Health shows 18 Total Checks, 8 Healthy, 6 Warnings, 4 Errors
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Credibility & Supplier Intelligence Phase verified. Product 68f41478-9ca2-48c6-997d-b121e2ef8ee9 has been enriched with all 4 data sources (AliExpress, CJ Dropshipping, TikTok, Meta). data_confidence=estimated, source_signals has 6 signals. Backend endpoints: POST /api/data-integration/enrich/{id}, POST /api/data-integration/run-ingestion (admin), GET /api/data-integration/source-health, GET /api/data-integration/ingestion-status. Frontend components: SourceTrustBadge, SourceDot, FreshnessIndicator all working. System Health at /admin/health shows API integration status.

Data_Integration_API.enrich_endpoint: POST /api/data-integration/enrich/{product_id} - enriches product with all 4 sources
Data_Integration_API.ingestion_status: GET /api/data-integration/ingestion-status - enriched count and confidence breakdown

Frontend_Components.SourceTrustBadge: Shows Live Data/Estimated/Fallback with icon - data-testid='trust-badge-{confidence}'
Frontend_Components.SourceBreakdownPanel: Grid showing per-signal source info - data-testid='source-breakdown-panel'
